untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) 'failed breakout below support' - requires multi-bar pattern recognition and support level identification not directly available in indicator set; (2) 'sharp momentum bars emerge AGAINST breakout direction' - requires directional momentum measurement and comparative bar analysis across multiple periods; (3) 'consolidation below support level' - requires pattern recognition of consolidation zones. The allowed indicators cannot express these structural price pattern conditions. Parameters momentum_bar_size_ratio, consolidation_bars_minimum, pullback_retracement, and bars_to_hold_below_support lack concrete definitions and cannot be operationalized with available indicators.
translation_notes: Approximated entry using pivot support (s1) break above, volume confirmation, and momentum bar size (body > atr). Exit at resistance (r1). However, the core signal logic—detection of failed breakout patterns and consolidation zones—requires multi-bar pattern logic not available in the allowed indicator set. This translation is a rough approximation and should not be used without additional context and threshold calibration.
